name: ​Freshsales
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

​What Freshsales Does

​Freshsales by Freshworks is a modern, easy-to-use CRM designed for growing sales teams. It serves as a strong middle ground for agencies that need more structure and automation than Vcita offers but are not ready for the cost or complexity of Salesforce. Freshsales focuses on usability while still supporting core sales workflows like lead management, pipelines, and automation.

It includes Freddy AI, Freshworks’ built-in AI assistant, which helps score leads, surface insights, and recommend next-best actions, so sales reps know who to follow up with and when.

Source: Freshsales

​Key Features

  • ​AI Lead Scoring: Freddy AI analyzes engagement patterns to flag hot leads and nudge you to follow up.
  • ​Built-in Chat & Phone: Communicate with leads via WhatsApp, chat, or phone directly from the CRM without third-party setup.
  • ​Visual Sales Pipeline: A clean, Kanban-style view that makes it easy to drag deals from “Proposal” to “Closed Won.”

​Benefits of Freshsales

  • ​Low Barrier to Entry: Most teams can get a working setup in under 30 minutes.
  • ​Competitive Price: It offers a lot of “enterprise-grade” features like AI and automation starting as low as $9/month.

​Pricing

  • ​Growth: $9 to $15/user/month
  • ​Pro: $39/user/month
  • ​Enterprise: $59 to $69/user/month

​Pros

​✅ Modern, intuitive interface that teams actually enjoy using.

✅ Great AI-driven insights for smaller budgets.

​Cons

​🚫 Reporting can be a bit rigid compared to more advanced CRMs.

🚫 Mobile app performance can sometimes be inconsistent.

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“Freshsales overall is quite a good product, but sometimes the advanced automation and reporting features seem a bit complex, especially for new users.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
summing_up_description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

Summing Up…

Vcita often falls short for scaling agencies managing high-volume, low-margin SMB accounts due to manual fulfillment gaps and fragmented data. 

Synup OS is a premier “agency operating system” that unifies CRM, white-labeled client portals, and automated fulfillment (listings, reviews, social) into one single source of truth. Other top contenders include Nimble for relationship tracking, Keap for complex automation, and Close CRM for aggressive outbound sales. 

By switching to a dedicated agency platform, you can eliminate spreadsheet nightmares, protect profit margins, and stop client churn through proactive health monitoring. 

‍

​Get Started with Synup

​Synup OS is the only operating system on this list built from the ground up for the unique chaos of high-volume agency life. It does not just manage the relationship but also the work.

​By centralizing your sales, onboarding, and fulfillment on a single platform, you stop profit-leaking manual labor and start scaling. Book a demo with Synup today and see how you can offer your own white-labeled marketing apps to your clients while cutting your internal admin time.

‍

Best Vcita Alternative: FAQs

  1. ​What is the best Vcita alternative for local marketing agencies?

If you manage high-volume SMB accounts, Synup OS is a strong choice. While Vcita is designed primarily for solo practitioners and small service businesses, Synup is built as an agency operating system. It goes beyond scheduling and billing to support actual fulfillment. With white-labeled marketing tools for listings management, reviews, and social media, Synup allows agencies to manage multiple clients and locations from a single platform.

  1. ​Are there free alternatives to Vcita?

While platforms like Freshsales or Salesforce offer limited free tiers, they are usually lite versions that won”t help you scale. You will typically need a paid plan. If you are serious about protecting your profit margins, free usually ends up costing you more in manual labor and tool sprawl.

  1. What Vcita alternative allows me to white-label?

Synup OS and Thryv offer the strongest white-labeling options. Synup OS specifically allows you to brand the entire client portal and the fulfillment apps themselves. This makes your agency look like it has proprietary technology, which builds massive trust with clients and justifies your management fees.

‍
